name: codex-approvable-review-tools
description: Codex-approvable PR review policies and daily Slack-driven review triage workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Review approvable PRs and triage daily Slack queues.
interface.longDescription: Bundle of two Codex skills: Codex Approvable Review for labeled GitHub review actions, and Daily Slack Codex Approvable Review for surfacing and reviewing eligible PRs from Slack channels.
defaultPrompt: Review this PR with Codex Approvable Review.
Scan these Slack channels for codex-approvable PRs.
